author: Alex Peczon
description: Review spelling and grammar issues in the current note from a Google Docs-style suggestion menu. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Alex Peczon
manifest.description: Review spelling and grammar issues in the current note from a Google Docs-style suggestion menu.
manifest.name: Quick Autocorrect

name: Quick Autocorrect

releases.author: BakedSoups
releases.description: # Quick Auto Correct 1.0.1 Updated with Obsidian auto review scans, currently stuck in stale version i n scan. Usually in Obsidian, correcting misspellings means hovering over each typo, opening the suggestion menu, and fixing words one at a time. I liked the Google Docs tool that scans the whole document and shows suggestions in one place, so I made a custom plugin for that. ## Features - Check the current note from the command palette.a - Review spelling and grammar issues in one menu. - Apply suggested replacements directly in the editor. - Ignore issues or move to the next suggestion. - Add words to a custom dictionary. - Use Standard, Premium, Local, or Custom LanguageTool endpoints. ## Screenshots
